name: cybervett
description: Responsible, structured technical interviews with human-controlled hiring decisions.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cybervett/contracts && npm run build --workspace @cybervett/api && npm run build --workspace @cybervett/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @cybervett/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @cybervett/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @cybervett/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @cybervett/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.migrate: npm run build --workspace @cybervett/contracts && npm run build --workspace @cybervett/api && npm run migrate --workspace @cybervett/api
